name: The Face Men Thailand
original_name: เดอะเฟซเมนไทยแลนด์
overview: The Face Men Thailand is an international Thai reality television modeling competition for males. Focusing on finding the next top male model and actor. It is a spin-off of The Face Thailand, featuring teams mentored by industry experts who compete in weekly acting, modeling, and charisma challenges.

trailers.title: The Face Men Thailand Season 4 | [Official Teaser Trailer] | ตัวอย่างรายการ
